extortion.description: silvestres.com zoominfo.com/c/silvestres-sa/359809243 Silvestres Flowers has been dedicated to growing and sharing Colombian feelings through high-quality fresh cut flowers since 1988. With an annual production of nearly 85,000 stems, they have created over 1,160 jobs focused on the processes of cultivation, marketing, and distribution. Their intended clients include global customers who appreciate authentic floral experiences. They are recognized for their excellence in flower quality and commitment to sustainable practices
